CustomField.description: Consolidates product interest from LST Primary 1-3 for reports.
CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "FAP - AGENTS FLOURESCENT IMAGING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "FAP - AGENTS FLOURESCENT IMAGING") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "FAP - AGENTS FLOURESCENT IMAGING"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "FAP"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "FAP"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "36-FAP")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-FAP
